name: Leading Presence
description: The grounded, magnetic center-of-the-room quality. For roles that hold the screen — and auditions that hold the panel.
gesture: Slowly open both hands outward from the sternum, palms up — offering the room something
identityScript: I don't chase the room's attention; I set the room's tempo. My stillness is louder than other people's noise.

name: Calm Confident Self
description: The classic upgrade: settled self-belief, a steady chest, a kind inner voice, and bold first moves — starting every morning.
gesture: One slow breath in while rolling the shoulders back and down, chin level
identityScript: I am someone who figures things out. Feelings visit me; they don't drive. I move first and adjust in motion.

name: Fearless Speaker
description: For the student who knows the answer and never says it. Voice in the first five minutes, courage on tap, help asked early.
gesture: Plant both feet flat, sit or stand one inch taller, hand ready to raise
identityScript: My voice belongs in the room. Speaking early is easy speaking. A question from me is a gift, not a risk.

name: Unshakeable Calm
description: For self-managing the hot moments — anger, impulse, overwhelm. Slow the needle, name the weather, respond on purpose.
gesture: Press thumb and forefinger together while exhaling for six slow counts
identityScript: I am the calmest person in my own storms. Feelings are weather; I am the ground. I answer, I don't react.

name: Lion Heart
description: Front-foot courage, decisive moves, a voice that doesn't hedge. Walk like the savanna is yours — because today, it is.
gesture: Chin up, chest open, one slow deliberate step forward
identityScript: I move first. I speak plainly. Fear is just the smell of something worth doing — and I walk toward it.

name: Athlete Mindset
description: Two weeks of identity prep before the body work. Show up daily, finish everything, recover on purpose — the athlete arrives before the muscles do.
gesture: Clap once, then set both hands on hips — the pre-game stance
identityScript: I am an athlete in training, starting from the inside. I never miss twice. My body follows the person I practice being.

name: Magnetic Creator
description: Grounded manifestation: a vivid vision, gratitude in the body, and one aligned real-world step every single day.
gesture: Both hands over the heart, then open outward — receiving, then releasing into action
identityScript: What I want is already in motion because I move daily. I see evidence everywhere, I say thank you out loud, and I take the step.
